3042100.name: Harrowed World: What's Past Is Portents - Story Pack
3042100.description:
Step deeper into a world of insidious vampires as five distinct protagonists. Experience five more sinister vampiric tales, with varied characters, and locations, in this atmospheric expansion to Harrowed World: What’s Past Is Portents.

Unravel their splintered society of ancient rivalries, twisted ideologies, and disturbing practices that govern their eternal existences. From grotesque experiments in the shadow of Queen Victoria’s reign to the quiet tyranny of modern boardrooms, their influence festers through the ages.

The Story Pack grants you access to all six stories as they are released. Isaac’s Story is free with the base game. Duncan's Story is available at the launch of the Story Pack, with the remaining tales arriving at no extra cost in future updates.

You are Dr Duncan Richard Edwin-Oswald, a renowned physician, a gentleman, and a kind-hearted philanthropist. 

 

Cursed by guilt and consumed by grief, you consider taking drastic measures, when you are visited by a mysterious woman who is not all that she seems.

(Coming Soon)

You are Tamali Chandra; while dealing with your husband’s recent betrayal, your whole life is changed completely for the second time.

 

Hungry, thirsty, confused, and alone is a bad combination when you’re a newly turned vampire.

(Coming Soon)

You are Vincent Locke, a police detective investigating a series of gruesome cultish murders when you become the primary suspect.

 

Will you discover the perpetrator or go down for the killings yourself?

(Coming Soon)

You are Ivy Ashbrook, a streaming paranormal investigator who specialises in fake hauntings.

One night while staying in an abandoned house, you discover much more than you bargained for.

(Coming Soon)

You are NOT Bella Quillan, and this is NOT your story, or is it?

You are an ordinary worker in a seemingly mundane office forced to track down your missing girlfriend when the police refuse to investigate, stating a lack of jurisdiction on the corporation’s property.  

  • Varied Voices: Each Story boasts a different narrator as a new vampire recalls events from their earlier years.

  • Legends of the Legacies: Unlockable exclusives that reveal the various vampiric bloodlines from Harrowed World: Portents In Red, an upcoming modern gothic vampire RPG.

  • Deeper Lore: Uncover further pieces of vampiric lore through the unfolding tales and the careful selection of dialogue options.

  • Preludes in Red: Be introduced to important vampires and factions from ‘Harrowed World: Portents In Red’, an upcoming modern gothic vampire RPG.

  • Expansions of Darkness: Expands on the gothic style and features introduced in the base game including the Internal Achievements and Lexicon Systems.

  • Duncan's Story Duration: A single playthrough should take around 30 minutes (as long as you do not pull the lever yourself) but it is designed to be played multiple times.

  • Tamali's Story Duration: TBC

  • Vincent's Story Duration: TBC

  • Ivy's Story Duration: TBC

  • Bella's Story Duration: TBC

英语*
